result.summary: Persona exposes one authenticated REST API family (including Webhooks and Relay) plus a GraphQL surface with unknown auth and a public MCP server at docs.withpersona.com/_mcp/server.

persona_api_key.label: Persona API key
persona_api_key.setup: Go to the Persona Dashboard and open the [API Keys](https://docs.withpersona.com/api-keys) page. Create a new API key for the environment you want to use (sandbox or production). Persona documents this key as the credential used for API access and notes that certain Relay endpoints need the `privacy_pass.write` permission enabled on the key.
